## How Was This Tested?
<!-- Required — describe what you ran to verify this -->
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`python -m pytest`)

- [ ] Manual API testing (describe below)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (`ruff check`, `black --check`)
- [ ] Self-review completed — no debug prints or dead code
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials committed
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / CHANGELOG) if needed
